title: Berisfords 35 mm Rainbow Stripe Ribbon, Multi-Color
features: Ribbons have been used by the acrobats, rhythmic dancers, and jugglers
It can also be used by people celebrating and taking part in the Pride celebrations
Measures 20 metre length by 35 mm width
description: Product Description Beresford's Rainbow Ribbon looks amazing when in action. Perform whirlwinds, waves and tornados with these ribbons. Ribbons have been used by the acrobats, rhythmic dancers, and jugglers. It can also be used by people celebrating and taking part in the Pride celebrations as it takes on the theme of the rainbow nation. Available in multi colour stripe. Box Contains 1 x 20 metre Length Ribbon Reel
